purpose: Public official Romanian payment destinations for everyday invoices; exact-match backend seed only.
rules: Only public official sources from supplied research were imported.
Duplicate IBANs already present in existing payment_destination_registry_ro_*.json files were skipped.
All imported IBANs passed local IBAN structural validation.
Raw IBANs are backend seed only; client display uses masked IBANs.

trust_tiers.T1_PUBLIC_OFFICIAL: Published by the merchant/institution on an official webpage or official public document.
